name: 918 Spyder
description: The 918 Spyder redefined the supercar, combining a high-revving V8 with advanced hybrid technology for breathtaking performance. Built in limited numbers, it stands as a milestone of our innovation and motorsport heritage.

name: Carrera GT
description: The Porsche Carrera GT is a legendary supercar powered by a naturally aspirated V10 engine that delivers raw, race-inspired performance and an unforgettable driving experience. Built with advanced carbon-fiber technology and a manual transmission, it represents one of our most iconic and pure driver-focused machines.

name: GT3 RS
description: The Porsche 911 GT3 RS is a track-focused high-performance sports car engineered for maximum aerodynamics, precision handling, and razor-sharp responsiveness. Its naturally aspirated flat-six engine, lightweight construction, and aggressive design make it one of the most extreme road-legal models in our lineup.

name: Macan
description: The Porsche Macan is a compact luxury SUV that blends everyday practicality with the sporty performance and driving dynamics Porsche is known for. With its refined interior, responsive turbocharged engines, and confident handling, it delivers a premium experience for both city driving and long-distance travel.

name: 718 Cayman
description: The Porsche 718 Cayman is a mid-engine sports coupe designed for precise handling, balanced performance, and pure driving enjoyment. Its turbocharged flat-four engine, sharp steering, and sleek aerodynamic design make it one of the most agile and engaging cars in our lineup.

name: 911 Turbo S Cabriolet
description: The Porsche 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a high-performance convertible that combines breathtaking acceleration with open-top driving excitement. Its twin-turbocharged flat-six engine, advanced all-wheel-drive system, and luxurious interior deliver a perfect blend of everyday comfort and supercar-level performance.

name: Panamera
description: The Porsche Panamera is a luxury sports sedan that combines executive comfort with thrilling performance and sharp handling. With powerful engine options, advanced technology, and a spacious premium interior, it delivers the perfect balance of practicality and Porsche driving dynamics.

name: Taycan
description: The Porsche Taycan is an all-electric sports sedan that delivers instant acceleration, precise handling, and cutting-edge performance technology. Its futuristic design, advanced digital cockpit, and powerful dual-motor setup make it a perfect blend of sustainability, luxury, and Porsche driving excitement.

name: 911 Turbo S
description: The Porsche 911 Turbo S is a high-performance sports car that delivers explosive acceleration, exceptional grip, and everyday usability. Its twin-turbocharged flat-six engine, advanced aerodynamics, and refined interior make it one of the fastest and most versatile models in our lineup.
